title: Dashboard Timeline Widget Change Order
excerpt: I cannot seem to change the order of my board groupings in the Timeline widget on my dashboard. I have important info that I need on top, and that board always gets sent to the bottom (presumably because it was created r…

posts.author: itsalex (Alex J)
posts.cookedHtml: I cannot seem to change the order of my board groupings in the Timeline widget on my dashboard. I have important info that I need on top, and that board always gets sent to the bottom (presumably because it was created recently?) Has anyone experienced this? Is there a fix for this?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you share a screenshot of what you’re looking at? I’m struggling to understand the concern

posts.author: itsalex (Alex J)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is the timeline widget within my dashboard. If, for example, I wanted to move “Digital” to the top, I cannot see how to do that. I cannot drag it in “edit” mode, and there is nowhere in the edit menu to rearrange the order.

Monday Support Screenshot396×752 19 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Are those ‘sections’ also the same ‘groups’ from your board? If so, what if your reorganize your groups on your main table?
